scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,admin -c blue,magenta "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n server,admin,agent,feishu,qiwei -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:agent" "bun run dev:feishu" "bun run dev:qiwei"
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -n server,admin,agent -c blue,magenta,cyan "bun run dev:server" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:channels: concurrently -n feishu,qiwei -c yellow,green "bun run dev:feishu" "bun run dev:qiwei"
scripts.install:all: cd server && bun install && cd ../admin && bun install && cd ../agent && bun install && cd ../channel-feishu && bun install && cd ../channel-qiwei && bun install
